title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC are on the latest version
scenario: Language update via Device Settings > Language does not apply to charge case menus after successful update on latest firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with the device connected (both earbuds and charge case on latest firmware).
3. Select a new language from the list.
4. Tap "Update Now" to initiate the language update.
5. Wait for the language change to complete on the device.
6. Verify that the charge case menus display text in the newly selected language.
expected: After completing the language update, the charge case menus should display all text in the newly selected language.
